questionHtml: Calculate the change in consumer expenditure on imported chia seeds in Nofiberland resulting from the imposition of the tariff.
markschemeHtml:
21 × 22 − 15 × 31 = 462 − 465

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

= −$3 million

An answer of −$3 million or 3 without any valid working is sufficient for [1].
